title: Interpret and apply irrigation designs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Interpret and apply irrigation designs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the key features on an irrigation design

pcs.text: Identify and apply commonly used symbols and abbreviations on plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply commonly used symbols and abbreviations on plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply commonly used symbols and abbreviations on plans.

pcs.text: Identify and apply common irrigation terms used on plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply common irrigation terms used on plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply common irrigation terms used on plans.

pcs.text: Identify key features of irrigation plans, elevations and sections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key features of irrigation plans, elevations and sections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key features of irrigation plans, elevations and sections.

pcs.text: Identify scale, elevations and sections from drawings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify scale, elevations and sections from drawings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify scale, elevations and sections from drawings.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position the designed system in relation to the landscape of the site.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental impacts of the irrigation system, and its installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental impacts of the irrigation system, and its installation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare as constructed drawings.
